mapper.select: SELECT MAX(OCRTIME) AS UPDATE_TIME FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrtime}::TIMESTAMP

SELECT SYSNAME AS sysname , PORT AS port, UNIT AS unit, TMPER AS tmper, RXCUR AS rxcur , RXMIN AS rxmin, RXMAX AS rxmax, RXAVE AS rxave, TXCUR AS txcur, TXMIN AS txmin, TXMAX AS txmax, TXAVE AS txave, TO_CHAR(OCRTIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ocrtime FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrtime} ::TIMESTAMP

insert.if:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST (SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME) VALUES
(#{item.sysname}, #{item.port}, #{item.unit}, #{item.tmper}, #{item.rxCur}, #{item.rxMin}, #{item.rxMax}, #{item.rxAve}, #{item.txCur}, #{item.txMin}, #{item.txMax}, #{item.txAve}, #{item.ocrtime})
-- ON CONFLICT (SYSNAME, PORT, OCRTIME) DO NOTHING
